meta.title: Could this be America's next refueling tanker?
meta.description:
California-based startup JetZero has a plan to bring America’s most potent airpower advantage into the 21st century using an entirely new approach to aircraft design. Let’s talk about their proposed KC-Z4 blended-wing body refueling tanker.
